articles.title: Is Adyen (ENXTAM:ADYEN) Undervalued As Investors Reassess Its Premium Growth Story?
articles.summary: The European Central Bank has selected Adyen (ENXTAM:ADYEN) as one of 36 payment firms to pilot the digital euro, placing the company at the center of testing this proposed central bank digital currency. See our latest analysis for Adyen. Despite the digital euro pilot placing Adyen in a high profile policy experiment, the stock has had a weaker run. The share price is down 40.8% year to date and the 1 year total shareholder return has declined 45.3%, which signals that momentum has been...

articles.title: Adyen (ENXTAM:ADYEN) Stock Could Be 39% Undervalued As Digital Euro Test Starts
articles.summary: Adyen stock is caught between two competing valuation messages right now, with the Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate pointing to a sizeable upside gap while market-based earnings multiples suggest the shares are already pricing in a lot of optimism after years of weak returns. Over the past 5 years, Adyen’s share price has declined 61.1%, which puts the current valuation debate in the context of a long period of weak investor returns. Recent inclusion in the European Central Bank’s...

articles.title: Adyen (ENXTAM:ADYEN) Joins The ECB Digital Euro Pilot Initiative
articles.summary: Adyen (ENXTAM:ADYEN) has been selected by the European Central Bank for the digital euro pilot initiative. The company will help test a central bank digital currency project focused on supporting European monetary sovereignty. The pilot places Adyen among a small group of payment firms involved in building potential future euro payments infrastructure. For investors following Adyen, the ECB digital euro pilot highlights how closely the company is tied into European payments infrastructure...

articles.title: ECB Picks Revolut, Stripe, and 34 Others to Test the Digital Euro

articles.title: Adyen names interim CFO as part of leadership update
